x-enumeration-literals.name: Automatic Debit Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Debit features are applied automatically without customer intervention whenever conditions are met.

Comment:
Example: Overdraft protection activates automatically when the account balance is insufficient.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Manual Debit Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Debit features are applied only when requested by the customer.

Comment:
Example: Customer manually activates cashback rewards or initiates a special debit transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Debit Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Debit features are applied only if specific conditions or rules are satisfied.

Comment:
Example: Daily withdrawal limit increases during promotional periods or for premium account holders.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduled Debit Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Debit features are applied at predefined times or intervals.

Comment:
Example: Monthly interest on negative balances is applied at month-end.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sequential Debit Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Determines the order in which multiple debit features are applied when multiple rules are relevant.

Comment:
Example: Scheduled bill payments are prioritized over ad-hoc payments if funds are insufficient.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exception Debit Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Debit features are applied differently under special conditions, overriding standard rules.
Example: Waiving daily limits or fees for emergency transactions or VIP customers.
